title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 Out on the official website - karresults.nic.in on 21-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 result.

content.text: The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) has officially released the Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 for students who appeared in the supplementary or improvement examinations. The results are now available online for Pre-University Course (PUC) students across various streams including Science, Commerce, and Arts.

Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 has been announced online on the official website - https://karresults.nic.in/. Students can check and download their results by entering their registration number and selecting the relevant exam details. It is advised that students carefully verify all the details mentioned on their scorecard and contact the board authorities in case of any discrepancies.

sections.heading: Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Karnataka Board has declared the 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026 for all streams including Science, Commerce, and Arts. The results are available online, and students can access them using their registration credentials through the official result portal.

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)

sections.heading: Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Karnataka Board has activated the direct link to check the 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026. Students who appeared for the supplementary exams can now access their results online through the official portal. Use the link below to view and download your result instantly.

sections.heading: Steps to Check Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026

items: Visit the official result website - https://karresults.nic.in/
Click on the link for "Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam-2 Results 2026".
Enter your Registration Number and other required details.
Your result will appear on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.
